text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I wander along the riverbank...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Heh, Opera O. Are you here to watch the sunset
too?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Not quite. I've come here... to make an oath.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...An oath?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Indeed. To the setting sun himself.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
He must be ill at ease. For to think—what should
become of this world without his glorious light?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I thought it only fitting that I be the one to
console him—and give my word as the rising
Centurial Overlord.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, Sun. You may rest in peace. I vow to
illuminate the world in your stead.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: (What the heck?!)

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
(What's with the "Overlord" title?! There's no way
she can make a promise with the sun! This is all so
freakin'...)

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: (So freakin' coooool!)

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Ah, uh... Actually, now you mention it... I was
thinkin' of making an oath to the sun too.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well now. Could you promise anything grander
than enshrining the operatic conquest of the
undefeated Overlord?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: En...shrining? Uh, t-totally! 'Course I can!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
My oath is to become the star of any distance! To
win more G1s than anyone ever, and show the
world what I'm made of!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna make my legacy shine brighter than all
others! And then I'll make a ginormous statue of
myself!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I swear I'll make a name for myself. A name that
shines brighter than the sun itself!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: ...Excellent!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Vodka, your ambition is indisputably... cool! I
daresay your coolness could even rival my
elegance!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. ♪ Well, I mean, uh... that's just me,
y'know?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Say, do you have some spare time? Let us share
all of our vows with the sun.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...Heh.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Opera O, it'd be my honor!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The pair run off down the riverbank, chasing the
sun's last glimmer over the horizon.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Uh, what is up with those two?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I came here to do some solo training, but now I
can't concentrate at all!
